text: Last class we planned a team activity.
Today we order food at a restaurant.
Menu
Order
Waiter
Dish
Dessert
Bill
Could I have the menu, please?
Could I have the fish dish, please?
Could you bring some water, please?
Could I have the bill, please?
Good evening! Here is the menu. Are you ready to order?
Yes, thank you. Could I have the fish dish, please?
Excellent choice! Would you like a dessert too?
Yes, please. Could I have the chocolate cake?
Of course! I will bring your food soon. Enjoy your meal!
Thank you! And later, could I have the bill, please?
For dessert, I want cake.

Good evening, and welcome to our restaurant. My name is Paulo, and I am your waiter tonight. Let me tell you about our specials. Today we have a wonderful fish dish with rice and vegetables. We also have a chicken dish with potatoes. For dessert, we have chocolate cake and fresh fruit. The menu is on your table. Please take your time. When you are ready, just call me, and I will take your order. Could I bring you some water first? Thank you, and enjoy your evening.

Hi, it is me. I am at a nice restaurant now. The menu is very big. I want to order the fish dish, because it looks delicious. Marcos wants to order the chicken. For dessert, we both want the chocolate cake. The waiter is very kind. We need to ask for the bill soon, because it is late. The food here is amazing. Next time you must come with us. Talk to you later. Bye!
First, read the menu. Then call the waiter. Next, say, could I have the fish dish, please. After that, order a dessert. Finally, ask, could I have the bill, please.

Could I have the menu, please?
Could I have the fish dish, please?
Could you bring some water, please?
For dessert, I want cake.
Could I have the bill, please?
The waiter is very kind.
